name: Skill Shope Publisher Guide
description: Everything you need to start publishing and earning on Skill Shope — listing creation, payout setup, pricing, and optimization.
longDescription: A comprehensive skill that guides developers through the full publisher journey on Skill Shope. Covers creating your first listing, setting up Stripe Connect for automatic payouts, hosting your source code, and optimizing your listing for discovery. Whether you're publishing a free skill or monetizing an MCP server, this guide walks you through every step.
skillContent:
---
name: skillshope-publisher
description: >-
  Guides developers through publishing and monetizing AI skills, MCP servers,
  and agent configurations on Skill Shope. Covers listing creation, pricing
  strategy, Stripe Connect setup for payouts, source hosting, and optimization
  for discovery. Use when a developer wants to publish, list, sell, or monetize
  their AI tools on Skill Shope.
---

Skill Shope is the registry for AI skills, MCP servers, and agent configurations. Publishers list their tools, set prices, and earn 85% of each sale. Skill Shope handles discovery, reviews, and payments.

## Quick Start

| Step | What to do | Details |
|------|-----------|--------|
| 1. Sign up | Sign in with GitHub at skillshope.com | Free, takes 30 seconds |
| 2. Set up payouts | Connect Stripe on your dashboard | Required for paid listings |
| 3. Host your source | Push your skill to GitHub or npm | Public repo or npm package |
| 4. Create listing | Fill out the publish form | Or upload a listing.json |
| 5. Optimize | Improve discoverability | Tags, description, compatibility |

## What Can You Publish?

| Type | What it is | Example install command |
|------|-----------|----------------------|
| **Skill** | A SKILL.md config that teaches AI assistants a specific task | `npx skillshope install your-skill` |
| **MCP Server** | A Model Context Protocol server for external tool access | `npx skillshope install your-mcp` |
| **Agent** | An autonomous workflow combining skills and tools | `npx skillshope install your-agent` |

## Pricing

| Model | When to use | Platform fee |
|-------|-----------|-------------|
| **Free** | Open source tools, community building, getting initial reviews | None |
| **Paid ($0.99+)** | Premium tools, commercial use, ongoing maintenance | 15% per sale |

Publishers receive 85% of each sale automatically via Stripe Connect.

## Key Policies

- You retain full ownership of your code
- No malware, spam, or IP-infringing content
- Reviews must be genuine — you cannot review your own skills
- Publisher verification (blue badge) is available and increases buyer trust
